## Verification

- [ ] Full gate passed on GitHub Actions.
- [ ] No local build or test was run.

## Repository boundary

- [ ] No copyrighted game assets, binaries, IDA databases, function tables, or reference repositories are included.
- [ ] New dependencies have an upstream source snapshot recorded under ignored `third_party-src/`.
